# Dion Samuel Coaching System

> Online lifestyle and transformation coaching by Dion Samuel (Team DSF).
> One-to-one coaching built on habits, mindset and discipline: personalized
> training programs, nutrition that fits real life, weekly check-ins,
> progress tracking, habit coaching and direct accountability.

## About the coach

Dion Samuel is a lifestyle coach with six years of coaching experience.
A career-ending football injury forced him to rebuild himself in the gym;
that process (consistency over motivation, systems over willpower) is the
foundation of his coaching. He works with busy people: professionals,
shift workers and students, and his goal is lasting change, not 12-week
stunts. No crash diets, ever.

## What clients get

- Personalized training program built around available equipment and hours
- Flexible nutrition plan (no banned foods, works with travel and eating out)
- Weekly check-ins with data, photos and plan adjustments
- Progress tracking (weight, measurements, lifts, photos)
- Habit and mindset coaching
- Direct accountability: clients message Dion himself

## How to enquire

Send a DM on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dionsamuel_/
There is no payment or commitment at the enquiry stage; Dion replies
personally within 24 hours.

## Links

- Website: https://www.dionsamuelfitness.com/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dionsamuel_/
